tools.name: ruff (Python)
tools.run_command: cd python-server && uv run ruff check .
tools.fix_command: cd python-server && uv run ruff check --fix .

tools.name: ruff-format (Python)
tools.run_command: cd python-server && uv run ruff format --check .
tools.fix_command: cd python-server && uv run ruff format .

linting.notes: Go linting uses standard go vet and go fmt. Python uses ruff for linting and formatting (replaces black), plus mypy for type checking. Pre-commit hooks enforce all checks.

testing.framework: go test (stdlib + godog for BDD), pytest (Python)
setup_required: python3 installed (for grcat test output colorizer)
cd python-server && uv pip install '.[dev]' (for Python tests)
env_vars: SERVER_URL=http://localhost:8080 (for FVT tests against running server)
testing.mock_patterns: godog scenarios with Given/When/Then steps, in-memory SQLite for storage
testing.notes: Go unit tests in ./auth/... ./internal/... ./cmd/..., integration tests in ./tests/features/... using godog/gherkin BDD framework. Python tests use pytest with markers (@pytest.mark.unit). Tests use in-memory SQLite for database.

gating_checks.name: API documentation verification
gating_checks.command: npm ci && make documentation && git diff --exit-code

ci.notes: CI runs on push to main/develop and on PRs. Quality checks include Go formatting, linting, vetting, all tests with coverage, and API doc verification. Coverage reports uploaded to Codecov. Docker image built on push events only.

build.install_command: make install-deps (runs go mod download && go mod tidy)
build.build_command: make build (builds bin/eval-hub and bin/eval-hub-init with race detector)
build.notes: Build uses -race flag for race detection. Python wheel building via make build-wheel with platform-specific targets. Container build uses multi-stage Containerfile with UBI9 Go toolset 1.25.

conventions.test_naming: TestXxx functions (Go), test_xxx functions with @pytest.mark.unit (Python), Scenario: (gherkin)
conventions.import_style: Standard Go imports with grouping. Python imports managed by ruff (isort rules).
conventions.notes: Go version 1.25.0, Python 3.11+. Conventional commits enforced via commitizen. Pre-commit hooks run linting, type checking, and tests.

lint_commands.command: cd python-server && uv run ruff check .

lint_commands.notes: Success: no issues found in 3 source files

test_commands.notes: All unit tests passed (auth, internal, cmd packages)
All integration tests passed (godog/gherkin BDD scenarios)

test_commands.command: cd python-server && uv run pytest tests/ -m unit --tb=short -v

container_recipe.notes: Container validation successful. All lint and test commands work. Python tests require uv installed and dev dependencies. Go tests use in-memory SQLite, no external services required.
